# Auto-generated TWISTER offline Pong model-size and spatial-regularization jobs for tiny-exp-scheduler.
#
# Run from the TWISTER repository root with conda env twister.
# Dataset path: /SSD_RAID0/lyk/shared_replay/diamond_pong_for_simulus_twister/twister/train
# Model sizes: ['base']
# WM initial source: real
# Mask presets: ['mask1']
# Spatial weights: [0.01, 0.1, 1.0, 10.0]
# Train steps: 100000
# Batch size: 16
# Batch length: 64
# Torch CPU threads per job: 8
# Log every: 10
# W&B enabled: 1
# W&B project: twister
# Total jobs: 4
#
# Usage:
#   tiny-exp-scheduler run scripts/experiments/pong_offline_regu_base_mask1.commands.txt --cuda-devices auto --logs-dir runs/pong_offline_regu_sweep/scheduler_logs --verbose --keep-job-tabs

bash -lc 'cd /home/lyk/projects/twister && OMP_NUM_THREADS=8 MKL_NUM_THREADS=8 OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=8 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=8 TWISTER_TORCH_NUM_THREADS=8 conda run --no-capture-output -n twister python -u train_offline.py --dataset-path /SSD_RAID0/lyk/shared_replay/diamond_pong_for_simulus_twister/twister/train --run-root runs/pong_offline_regu_sweep/logdir --run-name twister_pong_offline_regu_model=base_mask1_spatial_0p01 --model-size base --wm-initial-source real --spatial-regu-weight 0.01 --mask-preset mask1 --train-steps 100000 --batch-size 16 --batch-length 64 --torch-num-threads 8 --log-every 10 --wandb-enabled 1 --wandb-project twister --wandb-mode online --wandb-entity ssl-lab'
